get.description: Lists the available SaaSHub REST API operations.
Lists the SaaSHub Saas resource under the tenant.
Gets a SaaSHub Saas resource by its ID. The operation is supported for billing accounts with agreement type Microsoft Customer Agreement.

parameters.name: saasResourceName
parameters.description: The name that uniquely identifies a SaaSHub Saas resource.

put.description: Creates or updates a SaaSHub Saas resource.

parameters.name: saasResourceName
parameters.description: The name that uniquely identifies a SaaSHub Saas resource.

parameters.name: resource
parameters.description: Request parameters that are provided to the create SaaSHub Saas resource operation.

Azure-AsyncOperation.description: A link to the status monitor

Retry-After.description: The Retry-After header can indicate how long the client should wait before polling the operation status.

patch.description: Updates the properties of a SaaSHub Saas resource.

parameters.name: saasResourceName

parameters.name: properties

Location.description: The Location header contains the URL where the status of the long running operation can be checked.

Retry-After.description: The Retry-After header can indicate how long the client should wait before polling the operation status.

post.description:
Evaluates whether the request payload can create a new SaaS resource.
Not available in API versions 2023-01-01-preview.

parameters.description: Request parameters that are provided to the create SaaSHub SaaS resource operation.

post.description:
Evaluates whether multiple transaction requests can be processed at tenant level.
Only available starting in API version 2025-07-01-preview.

parameters.name: body
parameters.description: Request parameters that are provided to the tenant level canTransact operation.

post.description:
Gets coterm end dates for multiple resources at tenant level.
Only available starting in API version 2026-03-31-preview.

parameters.name: body
parameters.description: Request parameters that are provided to the GetCotermEndDates operation.

post.description:
Evaluates whether customers qualify for future price concessions when purchasing Microsoft 365 products.
On each evaluated product, hydrates the catalog product SKU for the constraints and checks whether
the sum of new and existing resources would meet the requirements for concessions.
Only available starting in API version 2026-03-31-preview.

parameters.name: body
parameters.description: Request parameters containing products to evaluate for future price eligibility.

post.description:
Evaluates customer eligibility for promotions on one or more products.
Only available starting in API version 2026-03-31-preview.

parameters.name: body
parameters.description: Request parameters containing products to evaluate for promotion eligibility.

PrerequisiteConstraintGroup.description: Prerequisite constraint group for promotion eligibility.

constraintsMet.description: Whether the constraints in this group are met.

lookbackWindow.description: Lookback window for the constraint evaluation.

cumulativeSeatConstraint.description: Cumulative seat constraint for this group.

requiredMinSeats.description: Required minimum seats for this product.

requiredMaxSeats.description: Required maximum seats for this product.

actualSeats.description: Actual seats owned by the customer.

PromotionEligibilityConstraint.description:
Promotion eligibility constraint with detailed evaluation results.
Extends EligibilityConstraint with additional type-specific properties.

Properties are grouped by constraintType:
- **firstPurchase**: Uses base properties only (constraintType, isEligible, failureDetails)
- **newCustomer**: Uses base properties only (constraintType, isEligible, failureDetails)
- **seatQuantity**: minSeatQuantityConstraint, maxSeatQuantityConstraint, currentSeatQuantityPurchased, minSeatQuantityRequiredToBePurchased, maxSeatQuantityWhichCanBePurchased
- **termDuration**: eligibleTermDurations, eligibleChargeDurations
- **qualifyingSubscriptionCoterminosity**: qualifyingSubscriptionTermEndDate, purchaseTermEndDate
- **productOwnership**: productsWhichMustAlreadyBeOwned
- **redemptionLimit**: maxPromotionRedemptionCount, remainingPromotionRedemptionCount, previousPromotionRedemptionCount
- **renewalPurchaseQuantity**: minEligibleSeatQuantity, maxEligibleSeatQuantity, renewalSeatQuantity, eligiblePurchaseLineItems
- **productLifetimeOwnershipExclusion**: failureDetails (with resourceUris and condition)
- **prerequisiteConstraints**: mustHaveAtLeastOne, mustHaveAny, mustHaveNone, failureDetails
- **newToOfferGrowthMarginDiscount**: minNewToOfferConstraint, maxNewToOfferConstraint, currentNewToOfferPurchased, minNewToOfferRequiredToBePurchased, maxNewToOfferWhichCanBePurchased
- **seatExpansionGrowthMarginDiscount**: minSeatExpansionConstraint, maxSeatExpansionConstraint, currentSeatExpansionPurchased, minSeatExpansionRequiredToBePurchased, maxSeatExpansionWhichCanBePurchased
- **upsellGrowthMarginDiscount**: minRequiredRatioThreshold, maxRequiredRatioThreshold, currentRatio, currentUpsellQuantity, requiredUpsellQuantity, minUpsellQuantityRequired

isEligible.description: true if eligibility is satisfied, false otherwise

minSeatQuantityConstraint.description:
Minimum seat quantity constraint.
Applicable when constraintType = "seatQuantity"

maxSeatQuantityConstraint.description:
Maximum seat quantity constraint.
Applicable when constraintType = "seatQuantity"

currentSeatQuantityPurchased.description:
Current seat quantity purchased.
Applicable when constraintType = "seatQuantity"

minSeatQuantityRequiredToBePurchased.description:
Minimum seat quantity required to be purchased.
Applicable when constraintType = "seatQuantity"

maxSeatQuantityWhichCanBePurchased.description:
Maximum seat quantity which can be purchased.
Applicable when constraintType = "seatQuantity"

eligibleTermDurations.description:
Eligible term durations. Example: ["P1Y", "P3Y"]
Applicable when constraintType = "termDuration"

eligibleChargeDurations.description:
Eligible charge durations. Example: ["P1Y"]
Applicable when constraintType = "termDuration"

qualifyingSubscriptionTermEndDate.description:
Qualifying subscription term end date.
Applicable when constraintType = "qualifyingSubscriptionCoterminosity"

purchaseTermEndDate.description:
Purchase term end date.
Applicable when constraintType = "qualifyingSubscriptionCoterminosity"

productsWhichMustAlreadyBeOwned.description:
Products which must already be owned. Each inner array represents products grouped by productId.
Applicable when constraintType = "productOwnership"

maxPromotionRedemptionCount.description:
Maximum promotion redemption count allowed.
Applicable when constraintType = "redemptionLimit"

remainingPromotionRedemptionCount.description:
Remaining promotion redemption count.
Applicable when constraintType = "redemptionLimit"

previousPromotionRedemptionCount.description:
Previous promotion redemption count.
Applicable when constraintType = "redemptionLimit"

minEligibleSeatQuantity.description:
Minimum eligible seat quantity for renewal.
Applicable when constraintType = "renewalPurchaseQuantity"

maxEligibleSeatQuantity.description:
Maximum eligible seat quantity for renewal.
Applicable when constraintType = "renewalPurchaseQuantity"

renewalSeatQuantity.description:
Renewal seat quantity.
Applicable when constraintType = "renewalPurchaseQuantity"

eligiblePurchaseLineItems.description:
Eligible purchase line items for renewal.
Applicable when constraintType = "renewalPurchaseQuantity"

mustHaveAtLeastOne.description:
MustHaveAtLeastOne constraint group - all products in this group must be owned.
Applicable when constraintType = "prerequisiteConstraints"

mustHaveAny.description:
MustHaveAny constraint group - at least one product in this group must be owned.
Applicable when constraintType = "prerequisiteConstraints"

mustHaveNone.description:
MustHaveNone constraint group - none of the products in this group should be owned.
Applicable when constraintType = "prerequisiteConstraints"

minNewToOfferConstraint.description:
Minimum new-to-offer quantity constraint.
Applicable when constraintType = "newToOfferGrowthMarginDiscount"

maxNewToOfferConstraint.description:
Maximum new-to-offer quantity constraint.
Applicable when constraintType = "newToOfferGrowthMarginDiscount"

currentNewToOfferPurchased.description:
Current new-to-offer quantity purchased.
Applicable when constraintType = "newToOfferGrowthMarginDiscount"

minNewToOfferRequiredToBePurchased.description:
Minimum new-to-offer quantity required to be purchased.
Applicable when constraintType = "newToOfferGrowthMarginDiscount"

maxNewToOfferWhichCanBePurchased.description:
Maximum new-to-offer quantity which can be purchased.
Applicable when constraintType = "newToOfferGrowthMarginDiscount"

minSeatExpansionConstraint.description:
Minimum seat expansion quantity constraint.
Applicable when constraintType = "seatExpansionGrowthMarginDiscount"

maxSeatExpansionConstraint.description:
Maximum seat expansion quantity constraint.
Applicable when constraintType = "seatExpansionGrowthMarginDiscount"

currentSeatExpansionPurchased.description:
Current seat expansion quantity purchased.
Applicable when constraintType = "seatExpansionGrowthMarginDiscount"

minSeatExpansionRequiredToBePurchased.description:
Minimum seat expansion quantity required to be purchased.
Applicable when constraintType = "seatExpansionGrowthMarginDiscount"

maxSeatExpansionWhichCanBePurchased.description:
Maximum seat expansion quantity which can be purchased.
Applicable when constraintType = "seatExpansionGrowthMarginDiscount"

minRequiredRatioThreshold.description:
Minimum required upsell-to-base ratio threshold.
Applicable when constraintType = "upsellGrowthMarginDiscount"

maxRequiredRatioThreshold.description:
Maximum required upsell-to-base ratio threshold.
Applicable when constraintType = "upsellGrowthMarginDiscount"

currentRatio.description:
Customer's current upsell-to-base ratio.
Applicable when constraintType = "upsellGrowthMarginDiscount"

currentUpsellQuantity.description:
Current upsell seat quantity owned by the customer.
Applicable when constraintType = "upsellGrowthMarginDiscount"

requiredUpsellQuantity.description:
Required upsell seat quantity to meet the constraint.
Applicable when constraintType = "upsellGrowthMarginDiscount"

minUpsellQuantityRequired.description:
Minimum upsell seats that must be purchased.
Applicable when constraintType = "upsellGrowthMarginDiscount"

failureDetails.description:
Failure details for the constraint evaluation.
Applicable to all constraint types when constraint fails.
For "productLifetimeOwnershipExclusion", contains resourceUris and condition details.
For "prerequisiteConstraints", contains failedConstraintGroup and productCodes.

TermDetails.description: Term details of the saas resource.

billingFrequency.description: Billing frequency of the product under the saas resource. Example P1Y and P1M

termUnit.description: The duration for which you can use the saas resource. Example P1Y and P1M

startDate.description: Start date of the term in UTC time. When there is a value passed in for PUT scenario, it is to support future start date scenario. The time part passed in will be ignored

endDate.description: End date of the term in UTC time. When there is a value passed in for PUT scenario, it is to support co-term scenario. When there is a value passed in for PATCH scenario, it is to support extend trial scenario. The time part passed in will be ignored

accountId.description:
The account identifier of the participant.
Must be one of msa:{puid}, org:{tid}, org:{tid}:{oid}, or mpn:{mpnid}

profileId.description:
The profile of the participant account.
Must be set to UNUSED when using accountId format mpn:{mpnid}

roleType.description:
The role that a participant account is playing on the transfer.
Possible values include IndirectReseller, AdvisoryPartner, ManagingPartner, TransactingPartner, Customer.

TransferToPartnerRequest.description: Request to transfer a SaaS resource to another partner tenant.

beneficiaryId.description:
The identifier of the recipient partner (beneficiary) to transfer the resource to.
Format: tid:{tenantId} for org account, or tid:{tenantId}:{objectId} for individual account.

billingScope.description:
The full billing scope of the recipient partner.
Format: /providers/Microsoft.Billing/billingAccounts/{baId}/billingProfiles/{bfId}/invoiceSections/{isId}

participants.description: Optional list of participants in the transfer operation.

ValidateFuturePriceEligibilityCopurchase.description:
Copurchased product for ValidateFuturePriceEligibility operation.
Products being purchased in the current transaction that establish ownership baseline.

productCode.description: Upn value of the product, which can be used to resolve product Id/sku Id/availability Id/term Id.

productContext.description:
Product context containing market and cloud information.
Optional; required if billingScope properties are not provided.

startDate.description: Term start date in ISO 8601 format.

resourceId.description:
ARM resource URI for existing asset.
Format: /providers/Microsoft.SaaSHub/saasResources/{resourceName}

resourceTokens.description: Optional array of resource tokens for product hydration.

ValidateFuturePriceEligibilityProductCon.description: Product context for ValidateFuturePriceEligibility request containing market and cloud information.

market.description: ISO 3166 country code for the market.

requestMetadata.description: Request metadata echoed back for correlation.

qualifyingCoterminousResources.description:
Groups of qualifying coterminous resources for future price concessions.
Reuses the existing CanCreateResultFuturePriceInfo model structure.

ValidateFuturePriceEligibilityRequest.description:
Request model for ValidateFuturePriceEligibility operation.
Evaluates whether customers qualify for future price concessions when purchasing Microsoft 365 products.

targetProducts.description: Products to evaluate for future price eligibility.

copurchasedProducts.description:
Products that may establish ownership baseline for future price eligibility.
These are products being purchased in the current transaction.

ValidateFuturePriceEligibilityRequestMet.description: Request metadata for ValidateFuturePriceEligibility response, echoed back for correlation.

productCode.description: Upn value of the product, which can be used to resolve product Id/sku Id/availability Id/term Id.

customerBillingScope.description: ARM billing scope for the customer, echoed from request.

ValidateFuturePriceEligibilityResponse.description: Response model for ValidateFuturePriceEligibility operation with pagination support.

nextLink.description: The link to the next page of items

productCode.description: Upn value of the product, which can be used to resolve product Id/sku Id/availability Id/term Id.

productContext.description:
Product context containing market and cloud information.
Optional; required if billingScope properties are not provided.

resourceTokens.description: Optional array of resource tokens for product hydration.

ValidatePromotionsProductContext.description: Product context for ValidatePromotions request containing market and tenant information.

market.description: ISO 3166 country code for the market.

customerTenantId.description: AAD tenant ID for the customer.

partnerTenantId.description: AAD tenant ID for the partner.

productCode.description: GUID representing productId, skuId, termDuration, billingPlan combination.

termEndDate.description: Purchase term end date in UTC time.

evaluationType.description:
Evaluation type for the promotion eligibility check.
Valid values: "Immediate", "ScheduledChange"

resourceUri.description:
Resource URI for ScheduledChange evaluation type.
Format: /providers/Microsoft.SaaSHub/saasResources/{resourceName}

resourceTokens.description: Product hydration tokens for authorization and context purposes.

productContext.description:
Product context containing market information and tenant context.
Required if billing scope properties are not provided.

discounts.description: The discounts for conditional discounts (e.g., CSP Growth Margin).

requestMetadata.description: Request metadata echoed back for correlation purposes.

eligibilityResults.description: Promotion eligibility results for this product.

products.description: List of products to evaluate for promotion eligibility.

partnerBillingScope.description: Partner billing scope (same format as customerBillingScope).

ValidatePromotionsRequestMetadata.description: Request metadata for ValidatePromotions response, echoed back for correlation.

productCode.description: GUID representing productId, skuId, termDuration, billingPlan combination.

customerBillingScope.description: Customer billing scope from the request.

partnerBillingScope.description: Partner billing scope from the request.

itemTrackingId.description: Custom item identifier for tracking, returned as-is from request.

market.description: ISO 3166 country code for the market.

customerTenantId.description: AAD tenant ID for the customer.

partnerTenantId.description: AAD tenant ID for the partner.

termEndDate.description: Purchase term end date in UTC time.

evaluationType.description:
Evaluation type for the promotion eligibility check.
Valid values: "Immediate", "ScheduledChange"

discounts.description:
The discounts for conditional discounts (e.g., CSP Growth Margin).
Only one discount is expected and supported per transaction for CSP Growth Margin.
